hero.headline: Premium New Zealand Fish Maw, Curated for Wellness
hero.subheadline: A Better Health storefront focused on premium fish maw selected for New Zealand customers who want quality, clarity, and trusted sourcing.

home.featuredSubtitle: A curated Better Health selection for New Zealand fish maw customers
home.brandStoryBody: Better Health is built around serving New Zealand customers looking for premium fish maw with clearer product information, trusted quality, and a more polished buying experience. We focus on quality-led selection, transparent grading, and products suited for gifting, nourishing soups, and daily wellness cooking.

guide.title: How to choose fish maw more confidently
guide.intro: For many New Zealand customers, fish maw is bought for gifting, family nourishment, or seasonal wellness cooking. Better Health is designed to make those decisions clearer and less intimidating.
guide.item1Body: If you want something practical for regular home cooking, medium-size premium fish maw is usually the easiest place to start. It gives you a strong balance of quality, usability, and price.
guide.item2Body: Larger, fuller pieces and gift-style options tend to suit festive gifting, visits to elders, and situations where presentation matters as much as nourishment.
guide.item3Body: If you are new to fish maw or want something simpler to prepare, ready-to-cook or more approachable mid-range options can be a better fit than starting with the highest-priced grade.

home.pillar1Body: A Better Health selection built for customers who want confidence, consistency, and quality-led fish maw options in New Zealand
home.pillar2Body: Weights, grading, use cases, and preparation notes are easier to compare before you buy
home.pillar3Body: Products are presented with clearer grading and positioning so customers understand what they are buying
home.pillar4Body: Suitable for premium gifting, nourishing soups, and everyday wellness cooking for New Zealand households

products.subtitle: Better Health fish maw selected for New Zealand customers

productDetail.storageText: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. For longer storage, place in a sealed bag and refrigerate for up to 1–2 years.
